name: execute_query
description: Execute a SELECT query and retrieve data. Returns rows as arrays. Supports all SELECT operations. Use for data retrieval and analysis.

name: execute_insert
description: Execute INSERT statement to add new records. Returns number of rows affected.

name: execute_update
description: Execute UPDATE statement to modify existing records. Returns number of rows affected. ALWAYS requires WHERE clause.

sql.description: UPDATE SQL with WHERE clause (required). Max 10,000 chars.

name: execute_delete
description: Execute DELETE statement to remove records. Returns number of rows deleted. ALWAYS requires WHERE clause.

sql.description: DELETE SQL with WHERE clause (required). Max 10,000 chars.

name: explain_query
description: Show query execution plan. Use to identify missing indexes and slow queries.

name: list_tables
description: List all user-defined tables with schema and type. Excludes system schemas.

name: describe_table
description: Get detailed column information for a table: names, types, nullability, defaults, keys.

name: list_indexes
description: List all indexes with columns, uniqueness, and type information.

name: list_schemas
description: List all non-system schemas (ATTACHed databases).

name: show_constraints
description: List all table constraints: PRIMARY KEY, FOREIGN KEY, UNIQUE.

name: list_triggers
description: List triggers defined on a specific table.

name: create_table
description: Create a new table with specified columns and constraints.

columns.description: Column definitions (required). Example: ['id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY', 'name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL']

name: drop_table
description: Drop (delete) a table and all its data permanently.

name: create_view
description: Create a database view from a SELECT query.

name: drop_view
description: Drop a view.

name: create_schema
description: Create a new schema (ATTACHed database).

name: drop_schema
description: Drop a schema (ATTACHed database).

name: create_index
description: Create an index on columns for faster queries. Supports UNIQUE indexes.

name: drop_index
description: Drop an index from a table.

name: show_table_status
description: Show table status information: rows, data length, engine, create time, collation.

name: show_processlist
description: Show active database connections and running queries.

name: show_variables
description: Show SQLite compile-time options and PRAGMA settings.

pattern.description: Optional LIKE pattern to filter variables.

name: show_status
description: Show database status counters.

pattern.description: Optional LIKE pattern to filter status.

name: show_databases
description: List all databases on the server.

name: show_engines
description: Show available storage engines.

name: list_users
description: List all database users from mysql.user.

name: show_grants
description: Show privileges for a specific user or current user.

user.description: Username (optional). Shows current user if omitted.

name: optimize_table
description: Run OPTIMIZE TABLE to reclaim unused space and defragment data.

name: analyze_table
description: Run ANALYZE TABLE to update index statistics for the query optimizer.

name: check_table
description: Run CHECK TABLE to check a table for errors.

name: flush_tables
description: Flush all tables or specific table.

name: truncate_table
description: Quickly delete all rows from a table.

name: add_column
description: Add a new column to a table.

name: drop_column
description: Drop a column from a table.

name: rename_column
description: Rename a column in a table.

name: alter_column_type
description: Change a column's data type.

name: rename_table
description: Rename a table.

name: create_user
description: Create a new database user.

name: drop_user
description: Drop a database user.

name: grant_privileges
description: Grant privileges to a user.

name: revoke_privileges
description: Revoke privileges from a user.

name: show_locks
description: Show current locks held by connections.

name: show_transaction_isolation
description: Show current transaction isolation level.

name: create_entities
description: Create knowledge graph entities with names, types, and observations.

name: create_relations
description: Create directed relations between entities.

name: delete_entities
description: Delete entities by name.

name: delete_relations
description: Delete a specific relation.

name: add_observations
description: Add observations to an entity.

name: delete_observations
description: Remove observations from an entity.

name: read_graph
description: Read all or filtered entities and their relations.

name: search_nodes
description: Search entities by name or type with LIKE query.

name: open_nodes
description: Retrieve entities by exact name lookup.

name: get_entity_stats
description: Get entity count grouped by type.

name: get_relation_stats
description: Get relation count grouped by type.

name: search_relations
description: Search relations with optional filters.

name: get_neighbors
description: Get neighbor entities in a given direction.

name: get_entity_degree
description: Get the degree of an entity (number of incident relations).

name: get_graph_statistics
description: Get total entity and relation counts.

name: vector_search
description: Perform vector similarity search on entity embeddings.

name: upsert_vector_embedding
description: Insert or replace a vector embedding for an entity.

name: delete_vector_embedding
description: Delete vector embeddings by entity name or id.

name: bfs_path
description: Find the shortest path between two entities using BFS.

name: fulltext_search
description: Search entities and observations by text content using LIKE.

name: list_fulltext_indexes
description: List all FULLTEXT indexes in the database.

name: rag_chunk_text
description: Split text into overlapping token windows for embedding. Pure (no DB write); returns chunks so the caller can embed each and pass them to rag_ingest_document.

name: rag_ingest_document
description: Store a document and its pre-embedded chunks. Each chunk needs a 384-dim embedding (computed by the caller's embedder, e.g. Voyage AI).

metadata.description: Optional metadata as a JSON string (default {}).

name: rag_upsert_chunks
description: Upsert chunks (with 384-dim embeddings) for an existing document without changing the document row.

name: rag_search
description: Hybrid retrieval over chunks: semantic (vector) + lexical (text) candidates fused with Reciprocal Rank Fusion, optionally diversified with MMR. Provide 'vector' (query embedding) and/or 'query' (text).

name: rag_vector_search
description: Pure semantic search over chunks by embedding distance (no lexical fusion).

name: rag_get_document
description: Fetch a document row by id.

name: rag_list_documents
description: List stored documents.

name: rag_delete_document
description: Delete a document and all of its chunks.

name: rag_stats
description: Return document and chunk counts.
